series_metadata.series_description: Contains all documents pertaining to wildlife management and research programs conducted statewide including annual reports and public area files.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 5 years, then send to the State Archivist for review. ; Paper: Paper records to be retained for 5 years unless they are scanned and saved in an electronic format. Once these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, then the paper copy will be sent to the State Archivist for review., Electronic: Archives ; Paper: Archives
